name: 🦑-230;; CHOI Su-bong.
description:
📀〢ˊ𖥔˙— “Why'd you have to make a record 'bout me?"

"When you and Thanos oficialized your relationship, The fans saw you as the "perfect pair", saying you two looked amazing together. But after you had broken up with him, by unknown reasons, Thanos was destroyed. He started using drugs, alcohol, and took a break from rapping for a few weeks. Once he returned, he released a song about you, his ex, talking about how he felt about you now that you left him. When you got notified about it, you called him, ready to confront him about the song and to why he was talking so badly about you."

Inspired by: "Song About Me"— TV GIRL
